Title: Asset inventory
Description: Tenant-isolated asset register with classification, value, category, owner and lifecycle fields plus a stat-row list and full CRUD pages.

Title: Asset-to-risk linking
Description: Many-to-many links between assets and the risks they are exposed to, managed on the asset detail page.

Title: Risk treatment plans (RTPs)
Description: First-class treatment plans with status, lead and target/actual dates that can spawn an owned, dated task.

Title: Risk category taxonomy
Description: Per-workspace controlled category list replacing free-text risk categories via a backfilled FK.

Title: Configurable RAG bands and risk appetite
Description: Per-org RAG thresholds and an optional appetite threshold driving risk banding and pills.

Title: 7-value SoA implementation status
Description: SoA status widened from 4 to the 7 toolkit values with existing rows migrated by a documented mapping.

Title: Per-control SoA owner
Description: Each SoA control gains an owner, editable on review and carried into the SoA export.

Title: SoA readiness weighting
Description: Maturity-weighted readiness score that excludes not-applicable controls, in the SoA domain.

Title: XLSX/CSV export for all modules
Description: Shared export helper and RLS-scoped route handlers emitting toolkit-mirrored XLSX/CSV for every register.

Title: Add saved views and filters to the asset inventory list
Description: Add saved views plus classification, value and category filters so large asset inventories stay navigable.

Title: Add bulk actions to the asset inventory
Description: Add bulk re-classify, re-assign owner and delete actions so assets are not edited one at a time.

Title: Surface asset review staleness in the needs-attention queue
Description: Flag assets whose lifespan or last-updated date is stale into the dashboard needs-attention queue.

Title: Show aggregate risk exposure on assets and asset counts on risks
Description: Display the highest linked residual RAG band on each asset and a linked-asset count on each risk.

Title: Add bulk asset-to-risk linking
Description: Allow several assets to be linked to a risk (and vice versa) in a single action.

Title: Add an asset coverage-gap view
Description: Flag high-value or highly-confidential assets that have no linked risks.

Title: Surface overdue RTPs on the risk and dashboard
Description: Flag RTPs past their target completion with no actual completion on the risk detail and needs-attention queue.

Title: Notify the RTP lead as the target date approaches
Description: Send the assigned lead a reminder via the existing notifications channel as an RTP target date nears.

Title: Roll up RTP progress onto the risk register list
Description: Show a plans-complete pill per risk on the register, not only on the detail page.

Title: Add a risk category management screen
Description: Let members rename, reorder, merge and archive risk categories.

Title: Add a reassign flow before deleting an in-use category
Description: Guide the user to reassign affected risks before an in-use category can be deleted.

Title: Add category-level risk roll-ups and heatmap
Description: Add per-category risk counts and a heatmap to the risk register.

Title: Add a RAG-banded 5x5 risk heatmap
Description: Render a Likelihood x Impact heatmap coloured by the configured RAG bands with per-cell risk counts.

Title: Add an appetite-breach queue
Description: List every risk whose residual score exceeds the configured appetite threshold.

Title: Validate and audit RAG threshold changes
Description: Validate thresholds inline as strictly increasing and record who changed the RAG configuration and when.

Title: Add bulk SoA status transitions and inline editing
Description: Allow multiple controls' implementation status to be set in one action with inline editing.

Title: Add per-control SoA status history
Description: Record a status-change timeline per control beyond the immutable finalised snapshot.

Title: Add SoA status filters to surface the backlog
Description: Add status filters and segments to surface the Pending and Absent control backlog.

Title: Add an SoA owner-workload view
Description: Group SoA controls by owner with counts by status to show who owns what.

Title: Add bulk SoA owner assignment
Description: Assign an owner across a selected group of SoA controls in one action.

Title: Notify SoA owners of pending controls before an audit
Description: Alert owners of controls still Pending or Absent ahead of an audit deadline.

Title: Surface SoA readiness percent and trend on the dashboard
Description: Show the weighted readiness percent and its trend on the dashboard and in the audit pack.

Title: Make SoA readiness weights configurable
Description: Allow the per-status maturity weights to be configured per workspace.

Title: Add SoA readiness breakdown by category and owner
Description: Break the readiness score down by category and by owner to locate gaps.

Title: Add an auditor audit-pack export bundle
Description: Bundle all registers, the finalised SoA snapshot and the evidence index into a single export for auditors.

Title: Add XLSX import round-trip (Phase B.5)
Description: Deliver the planned import and column-mapping wizard so exported workbooks re-import cleanly.

Title: Produce styled branded XLSX exports
Description: Add formatted header rows, sensible column widths and auto-filters so exports can replace the workbooks.

Title: Rate-limit and audit the export endpoints
Description: Apply rate limiting and audit logging to the export route handlers as the create actions already have.

Title: Harden CSV export against formula injection
Description: Neutralise leading =, +, - and @ in CSV cells so exported free text cannot execute as a spreadsheet formula.

Title: Add an XLSX export content assertion
Description: Add a round-trip read-back assertion instead of only checking the workbook container exists.

Title: Resolve dual lockfiles and pick one package manager
Description: Choose a single package manager and verify a frozen-lockfile install passes before deploy.

Title: Pin updated_by in the risk_matrix_config update policy
Description: Re-assert updated_by equals auth.uid() in the RLS with-check for the risk matrix config update policy.

Title: Stop swallowing the DB error in the RTP delete action
Description: Surface delete failures in deleteRtpAction instead of discarding the error.

Title: Add server-side owner-membership check in reviewSoaItemAction
Description: Re-validate the chosen SoA owner is an org member server-side rather than relying on the FK alone.

Title: Add an empty-id guard to asset link and unlink actions
Description: Defensively guard against a blank asset or risk id in the link and unlink actions.

Title: Fix dense_rank position collision in category backfill
Description: Make the 202607020011 category backfill collision-proof for values differing only by case.

Title: Assert filenames and use buttons in the export e2e
Description: Drive downloads via the buttons and assert the content-disposition filename in the export e2e.

Title: Normalise the evidence export owner fallback
Description: Change the evidence export owner fallback from an empty string to Unassigned for consistency.

Title: Revisit single-org assumption in risk-matrix-config read
Description: Replace the maybeSingle risk_matrix_config read that assumes a single active org.

Title: Spreadsheet import wizard (risk/SoA/asset)
Description: Upload XLSX/CSV, map columns, preview validation, confirm; RLS-scoped, server re-validated, round-trips with export

Title: Save & reuse column mappings
Description: Persist named mappings per workbook template to skip re-mapping

Title: Drag-drop upload + multi-sheet selection
Description: Nicer upload UX and per-sheet picking for multi-sheet workbooks

Title: Import history + undo-last-import
Description: Audit trail of imports with a one-click undo

Title: Dedup-on-re-import for risk/asset
Description: Match on a natural key instead of always inserting

Title: Real asset owner-name resolution
Description: Split/parse Owner & Location to resolve owner_id (currently a no-op)

Title: Async import for large workbooks
Description: Background job for >500-row files

Title: Downloadable blank import templates
Description: Provide header-matching template files for each module
